vocab.database: Use the Supabase JS client: supabase.from('table').select(). For type safety, generate types with `supabase gen types typescript`. Use RLS (Row Level Security) policies for per-row authorization.
vocab.authentication: Use supabase.auth.signInWithPassword() or signInWithOAuth(). Session is managed automatically. Access the current user with supabase.auth.getUser(). In Next.js, use @supabase/ssr for server-side session handling.
vocab.realtime: Subscribe to table changes with supabase.channel('room').on('postgres_changes', ...).subscribe(). Use broadcast for presence features. Always unsubscribe on component unmount.
vocab.storage: Use supabase.storage.from('bucket').upload() for file uploads. Generate signed URLs with createSignedUrl() for private files. Use upsert: true to overwrite existing files.
vocab.search: Use PostgreSQL full-text search via .textSearch('column', 'query') in the Supabase client. For vector search (AI features), use pgvector extension with the match_documents RPC function.
